text: Agusta-Bell AB-205 helicopter of the Hellenic Air Force made an emergency landing in Crete this morning "due to a technical malfunction."
text_zh: 希腊空军的一架阿古斯塔-贝尔 AB-205 直升机今晨因“技术故障”在克里特岛紧急迫降。

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Now Zionist forces storm Al-Ram neighbourhood in Occupied Jerusalem, kidnapping dozens of Palestinians including minors and former prisoners 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 犹太复国主义军队现正突袭被占领的耶路撒冷 Al-Ram 社区，绑架了数十名巴勒斯坦人，其中包括未成年人和前囚犯 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Germany's Merz on Ukraine: Ukraine feels like a European country. It is a European country. The European Union must not become an exclusive club. We must not lose Ukraine to Russia—not even in a perceived, emotional sense. Accession to the European Union always takes a very long time. But be careful not to raise hopes too high, which will then be followed by disappointment. At some point, there will be a ceasefire… and possibly parts of Ukraine will no longer be Ukrainian. We cannot say, ‘Someday you might be allowed to come.’ The steps must be credible, irreversible, and lead ultimately to membership. That will take time—but we must begin.
text_zh: 德国的默茨谈乌克兰：乌克兰感觉像是一个欧洲国家。它就是一个欧洲国家。欧盟绝不能成为一个排他的俱乐部。我们绝不能失去乌克兰，不能让它落入俄罗斯之手——即使是在感知上或情感上也不行。加入欧盟总是需要很长时间。但要小心，不要抱有太高的期望，否则随之而来的将是失望。在某个时刻，将会实现停火……而乌克兰的部分地区可能将不再属于乌克兰。我们不能说‘总有一天你可能会被允许加入’。这些步骤必须是可信的、不可逆转的，并最终导向成员国资格。这需要时间——但我们必须开始。

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ "We see how courageously and heroically they fight" : Putin expresses strong hope that Iran will overcome this difficult period of trials under the leadership of its new Supreme Leader and achieve lasting peace — DD Geopolitics on X 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: I love when Israelis are very honest ❗️ Israeli Minister of War Katz told the UN coordinator for Lebanon today that Israel has genocidal intent against Lebanon and that: "Israeli fire will burn the cedars of Lebanon." "The fire will burn Hezbullah and all of Lebanon," he added ✍ I wonder of sham the Nuremberg trials were when they decided to kill the German leadership over claims of vague genocidal intent, when Israelis have been very consistent and clear about seeking genocide
text_zh: 我喜欢以色列人非常诚实的时候 ❗️ 以色列战争部长卡茨今天对联合国驻黎巴嫩协调员表示，以色列对黎巴嫩有种族灭绝意图，并称：“以色列的炮火将焚烧黎巴嫩的雪松。”他补充说：“战火将烧毁真主党和整个黎巴嫩。” ✍ 我想知道，当纽伦堡审判以模糊的种族灭绝意图为由处决德国领导层时，那场审判是多么虚伪，而以色列人对于寻求种族灭绝的意图却一直非常一致且明确。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 Семь бед — один ответ 📝 Французы хотят заставить пожалеть о выгнанных контингентах Пока в Мали гремели выстрелы, французские СМИ на удивление мало распространяли фейки от боевиков и в принципе сухо комментировали боевую обстановку. Связано это с тем, что у них была более глобальная информационная задача — привязать развернувшийся кризис к нарративу «возвращения Франции в Сахель». Не успела проясниться картина вокруг Кидаля и Гао, как французы один за одним начали выкатывать материалы в стиле «на подумать» . Jeune Afrique , например, выложили длиннопост о том, что французы чуть ли не «объединяют» под своим крылом всю Африку. Журналисты из Africa Intelligence решили намекнуть более прозрачно — в своей свежей статье они сочинили тираду «усилиям Франции» в борьбе с боевиками в Бенине и даже в Нигерии . ❗️ В ближайшие недели таких материалов будет только больше, и их вслед за профильными изданиями подхватят и крупные СМИ. Первоочередная задача западной пропаганды — выставить в плохом свете сахельскую деятельность российских игроков и вернуть к жизни чучело приказавшей долго жить французской «архитектуры безопасности» в Западной Африке. #Сахель #Франция 💀 @rybar_africa — там, где политика горячее экватора 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АФРИКАРЬ： 📝 七灾一策 📝 法国人想让人为被驱逐的特遣队感到遗憾。当马里枪声不断时，法国媒体出奇地少传播武装分子的假消息，原则上对战斗局势的评论也很干瘪。这是因为他们有一个更宏大的信息任务——将爆发的危机与“法国重返萨赫勒”的叙事联系起来。基达尔和加奥周围的情况还没理清，法国人就一个接一个地抛出“引人深思”的材料。例如，《青年非洲》发布了一篇长文，称法国几乎是在其羽翼下“统一”了整个非洲。来自《非洲情报》的记者决定暗示得更明显一些——在他们最新的一篇文章中，他们编造了一篇关于“法国在贝宁甚至尼日利亚打击武装分子的努力”的演说。 ❗️ 在接下来的几周里，此类材料只会越来越多，继专业刊物之后，大型媒体也会跟进。西方宣传的首要任务是抹黑俄罗斯参与者在萨赫勒地区的活动，并复活那个早已名存实亡的法国在西非的“安全架构”稻草人。 #萨赫勒 #法国 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has teased the upcoming release of new FPV drone attack footage targeting what seems to be a Merkava tank with troops on it. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released footage of FPV drone strikes targeting a group of IDF troops recovering a disabled tank in southern Lebanon, followed by a failed strike on the rescue force afterward. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党预告了即将发布的新 FPV 无人机攻击画面，目标似乎是一辆载有士兵的梅卡瓦坦克。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了 FPV 无人机袭击画面，目标是一群在黎巴嫩南部回收受损坦克的以色列国防军士兵，随后对救援部队进行了另一次失败的打击。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 Turkey’s Sözcü reports that Turkish President Erdoğan instructed his aides to start preparations for snap elections in November 2027. @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Embassy in Baghdad has released a statement offering up to a $10 million reward for information on Haydar Muzhir Ma'lak al-Sa'idi, the Secretary General of Harakat Ansar Allah al-Awfiya (HAAA), an Iranian-backed militia group in Iraq. The U.S. has increasingly pressured the Iraqi government to reign in such groups as the Iraqi government faces an impasse over the formation of a government, as they struggle to balance both Iranian and U.S. interests within the country. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国驻巴格达大使馆发表声明，悬赏最高 1000 万美元征集有关 Haydar Muzhir Ma'lak al-Sa'idi 的信息，他是伊拉克伊朗支持的民兵组织“真主卫士运动”（HAAA）的秘书长。随着伊拉克政府在组建政府问题上陷入僵局，且难以平衡国内的伊朗和美国利益，美国正日益向伊拉克政府施压，要求其控制此类组织。推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Iranian-backed actors and their role in Iraq: https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/1834562888817938725?s=46 Key Judgment: Iranian-backed actors are deeply integrated in the Iraqi government and security forces. Due to this, Iran maintains the ability to shape the security dynamic in Iraq by/with/through proxy forces and IRGC operators. Barring a major policy shift, which could happen as a result of a change in administration, it’s highly unlikely that the U.S. will be able/willing to divorce such groups from the Iraqi government and security forces and maintain the significant presence of U.S.-Coalition forces in country. 4/4 - John M. Larrier tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：伊朗支持的参与者及其在伊拉克的作用：https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/1834562888817938725?s=46 关键判断：伊朗支持的参与者已深度融入伊拉克政府和安全部队。因此，伊朗保持着通过代理部队和伊斯兰革命卫队人员塑造伊拉克安全动态的能力。除非发生重大的政策转变（这可能是政府更迭的结果），否则美国极不可能有能力/意愿将这些组织与伊拉克政府和安全部队剥离，并维持美国联军在伊拉克的重要存在。4/4 - John M. Larrier 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Some context on recent reports from Iraq regarding the Iraqi government and competing U.S.-Iranian interests. Iraq-U.S. Dynamic: https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/2023988321802711522?s=46 Comment: U.S.-Iraq-Iran Dynamic (Image via ISW update) 🧵 So the U.S.-Sudani dynamic is actually seriously underreported on. Sudani has long touted his “ability” to keep Iranian-backed militias in check to U.S. decision-makers as a reason for sustained U.S. support for his current role. 1/ - John M. Larrier tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：关于伊拉克政府与美伊利益竞争的近期报道的一些背景。伊拉克-美国动态：https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/2023988321802711522?s=46 评论：美-伊-伊动态（图片来自 ISW 更新）🧵 实际上，美-苏达尼（Sudani）的动态被严重低估了。苏达尼长期以来一直向美国决策者吹嘘他“有能力”控制伊朗支持的民兵，以此作为美国持续支持他目前角色的理由。1/ - John M. Larrier 推文

text: Germany's Merz on Iran: This whole affair is, to say the least, ill-considered. At the moment, I cannot see what strategic exit the Americans are opting for. The Iranians are negotiating very skillfully—or rather, very skillfully not negotiating. An entire nation (the U.S.) is being humiliated. The Iranians are clearly stronger than one thought. The Americans clearly don’t seem to have a convincing negotiating strategy.
text_zh: 德国的默茨谈伊朗：整个事件至少可以说是不计后果的。目前，我看不出美国人选择了什么战略退出方案。伊朗人谈判技巧非常高超——或者说，非常高超地不进行谈判。整个国家（美国）正在受到羞辱。伊朗人显然比人们想象的要强大。美国人显然似乎没有令人信服的谈判策略。

text: WarTranslated Lithuanian intelligence services have uncovered a network of Russian GRU agents who were planning assassinations and preparing to commit arson against equipment destined for Ukraine. The perpetrators planned to destroy military hardware intended for the Armed Forces of Ukraine, as well as to eliminate military and civilian personnel on Ukrainian territory. https://lkpb.policija.lrv.lt/lt/naujienos/lietuvos-pareigunai-uzkirto-kelia-dvieju-zmoniu-nuzudymams-ir-teroristiniams-ispuoliams-pFN/ tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：立陶宛情报部门发现了一个俄罗斯格鲁乌（GRU）特工网络，他们计划进行暗杀，并准备对运往乌克兰的装备实施纵火。肇事者计划摧毁旨在提供给乌克兰武装部队的军事装备，并清除乌克兰境内的军事和文职人员。https://lkpb.policija.lrv.lt/lt/naujienos/lietuvos-pareigunai-uzkirto-kelia-dvieju-zmoniu-nuzudymams-ir-teroristiniams-ispuoliams-pFN/ 推文

text: OSINTdefender Following the April 21 and 23 maritime interdiction and right-of-visit boarding of two Iran-linked oil tankers, the Tifani and the Phonix, both tankers have been viewed moving west across the Indian Ocean, as analysts continue to speculate that their destination may be the United States. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：继 4 月 21 日和 23 日对两艘与伊朗有关的油轮“Tifani”号和“Phonix”号进行海上拦截和登船检查后，两艘油轮都被观察到正在向西穿越印度洋，分析人士继续猜测它们的目的地可能是美国。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi to Putin: The whole world witnessed Iran's true strength in confronting America, and it became clear that the Islamic Republic of Iran is a stable, strong, and effective regime. In the last war, it became clear that Iran has great friends and allies such as Russia; We thank you for your positions and support. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希对普京说：全世界都见证了伊朗在对抗美国时的真正实力，很明显，伊朗伊斯兰共和国是一个稳定、强大且有效的政权。在上次战争中，很明显伊朗拥有像俄罗斯这样伟大的朋友和盟友；我们感谢你们的立场和支持。推文

text: WarTranslated A monument to North Korean soldiers who died fighting in Putin’s war was solemnly unveiled in North Korea. Kim Jong Un stated that the North Korean government will continue to provide full support for Russia's policy in protecting its sovereignty, territorial integrity, and security interests. The video shows Ukrainian Leopard 2A4, AMX-10RC, and Husky vehicles in North Korea, although there have been no reports of North Koreans capturing such trophies. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：一座为在普京战争中阵亡的朝鲜士兵建立的纪念碑在朝鲜庄严揭幕。金正恩表示，朝鲜政府将继续全力支持俄罗斯保护其主权、领土完整和安全利益的政策。视频显示了乌克兰的豹 2A4、AMX-10RC 和 Husky 车辆出现在朝鲜，尽管目前没有关于朝鲜人缴获此类战利品的报道。推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Golani Brigade forces killed armed terrorists in southern Lebanon in close-quarters combat and a drone strike. Separately, troops uncovered Hezbollah weapons depots with anti-tank explosives, explosive UAVs, RPGs, and remote detonation systems. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048772874375254450/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 "Drones attacked not only Sevastopol but also hit sulfuric acid production in Cherepovets. And yet, the fifth year of Ukraine's demilitarization is ongoing," writes the disappointed famous Russian imperialist, journalist Maksim Kalashnikov. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2048772448401736139/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 “无人机不仅袭击了塞瓦斯托波尔，还击中了切列波韦茨的硫酸生产设施。然而，乌克兰去军事化的第五年仍在继续，”失望的著名俄罗斯帝国主义者、记者马克西姆·卡拉什尼科夫写道。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2048772448401736139/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 In southern Israel, at Eilat Airport, an additional 12 American KC-135 Stratotanker refueling aircraft have landed. ▪️ Preparations for the second phase of a military operation against Iran are reaching their peak. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2048771991822365031/video/1 tweet

text: ⭕️ بالفيديو | مشاهد من عملية استهداف المقاومة الإسلامية تجمّع جنود وقوة إخلاء تابعين لجيش العدو الإسرائيلي في بلدة الطيبة جنوبي لبنان بمحلّقتين انقضاضيّتين. جودة عالية #الإعلام_الحربي

text: ⭕️ بعد قليل...

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz told the UN special co‑ordinator for Lebanon Jeanine Hennis-Plasschaert that Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem is “playing with fire” and Lebanese President Aoun is gambling Lebanon’s future. “There will be no ceasefire in Lebanon while there is fire on our forces and on the Galilee communities,” he said. If the Lebanese government continues to shelter Hezbollah, “fire will come and burn the cedars of Lebanon,” Katz warned. He demanded that Hezbollah be disarmed first south of the Litani River up to the yellow line, and then across all of Lebanon. He added that the IDF is ready to act and assist in the mission. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 以色列国防部长以色列·卡茨告诉联合国驻黎巴嫩特别协调员珍妮·亨尼斯-普拉斯哈特，真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆是在“玩火”，黎巴嫩总统奥恩是在拿黎巴嫩的未来做赌注。“只要我们的部队和加利利社区还在遭受炮火，黎巴嫩就不会停火，”他说。卡茨警告说，如果黎巴嫩政府继续庇护真主党，“战火将烧毁黎巴嫩的雪松”。他要求真主党首先在利塔尼河以南至黄线区域解除武装，然后是整个黎巴嫩。他补充说，以色列国防军已准备好采取行动并协助完成这项任务。@wfwitness

text: 🇩🇪 Berlin Administrative Court ruled that German intelligence must remove the group Jüdische Stimme für gerechten Frieden in Nahost from its 2024 extremist list. Court says the “extremist” label can’t stay in the public report. Jüdische Stimme für gerechten Frieden in Nahost is a Berlin-based Jewish group advocating for Palestinian rights, ending the occupation, and criticizing Israeli policies. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇩🇪 柏林行政法院裁定，德国情报部门必须将“中东公正和平犹太之声”组织从其 2024 年极端分子名单中删除。法院表示，“极端分子”标签不能保留在公开报告中。该组织是一个总部位于柏林的犹太团体，主张巴勒斯坦权利、结束占领并批评以色列政策。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has teased the upcoming release of new FPV drone attack footage targeting what seems to be a Merkava tank with troops on it. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党预告了即将发布的新 FPV 无人机攻击画面，目标似乎是一辆载有士兵的梅卡瓦坦克。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ A woman was injured in a drone strike targeting the town of Baraashit.
text_zh: ❗️ 一名妇女在针对 Baraashit 镇的无人机袭击中受伤。

text: Germany's Merz: The French president is my friend, whatever his name may be.. If the key industries come together, there will be no more disputes over those industries, and no war arising from them.
text_zh: 德国的默茨：法国总统是我的朋友，无论他叫什么名字。如果关键产业联合起来，就不会再有关于这些产业的争端，也不会因此引发战争。

text: NEW: Berlin Administrative Court ruled that German intelligence must remove the group Jüdische Stimme für gerechten Frieden in Nahost from its 2024 extremist list. Court says the “extremist” label can’t stay in the public report. Jüdische Stimme für gerechten Frieden in Nahost is a Berlin-based Jewish group (founded 2003) advocating for Palestinian rights and criticizing Israeli policies. It calls for ending occupation + equal rights, known for anti-Zionist stance.
text_zh: 最新消息：柏林行政法院裁定，德国情报部门必须将“中东公正和平犹太之声”组织从其 2024 年极端分子名单中删除。法院表示，“极端分子”标签不能保留在公开报告中。该组织是一个总部位于柏林的犹太团体（成立于 2003 年），主张巴勒斯坦权利并批评以色列政策。它呼吁结束占领和实现平等权利，以反犹太复国主义立场而闻名。

text: 🇪🇺 💬 🇮🇷 Ursula thinks it's too early to lift the sanctions on Iran 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 💬 🇮🇷 乌尔苏拉认为现在解除对伊朗的制裁还为时过早 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ 📝 Food for thought 📝 How many more attacks will it take for real action? Events in Mali have significantly dampened celebrations of the annual "Week of Brotherhood," which the countries of the "Sahel trio" — Burkina Faso , Mali , and Niger — had recently positioned as a symbol of the bloc's development and prosperity. Perhaps Mali's destabilization will finally become the event that motivates Sahel governments to engage not only in purely propaganda-oriented activities, but also in measures that have at least some bearing on building up defense capabilities . Burkina Faso has already grasped the scale of the militants' offensive, but responded in its own manner — their recent plans to merge militia with the army were expanded yesterday to mass mobilization. Niger, meanwhile, has not launched any emergency defense measures at all. ❗️ Yet the task of defeating militants is not solved by simply recruiting new military personnel, but by qualitative changes in the armed forces structures themselves. The bloody events of last weekend showed that local armed forces still lack adequate elite units. #BurkinaFaso #Mali #Niger #Sahel 💀 @rybar_africa — where politics runs hotter than the equator 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版：转发自 @ 📝 引人深思 📝 还需要多少次袭击才能采取实际行动？马里发生的事件大大冲淡了“兄弟周”的年度庆祝活动，该活动由“萨赫勒三人组”——布基纳法索、马里和尼日尔——最近定位为集团发展和繁荣的象征。也许马里的动荡最终会成为促使萨赫勒政府不仅参与纯粹的宣传活动，而且参与至少与建立防御能力有关的措施的事件。布基纳法索已经掌握了武装分子进攻的规模，但以自己的方式做出了回应——他们最近将民兵与军队合并的计划昨天扩大到了大规模动员。与此同时，尼日尔根本没有采取任何紧急防御措施。 ❗️ 然而，击败武装分子的任务不是通过简单地招募新军事人员来解决的，而是通过武装部队结构本身的质量变革来解决的。上周末的血腥事件表明，当地武装部队仍然缺乏足够的精锐部队。 #布基纳法索 #马里 #尼日尔 #萨赫勒 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们 原消息

text: Aftermath of one of the Israeli attacks today in Lebanon. A new attack in Majdal Salam, in the Marjayoun district.
text_zh: 今天以色列在黎巴嫩袭击后的余波。马尔杰永区 Majdal Salam 发生了一起新的袭击。

text: FPV footage soon of the successful attack that killed and injured several Israeli soldiers in south Lebanon We have waited so long to get such footage, against the Israeli army. May this be the opening for many more, to restore Lebanon's occupied lands and liberate Lebanon. A long painful path...but a certain outcome
text_zh: 即将发布 FPV 画面，展示在黎巴嫩南部成功击毙并炸伤多名以色列士兵的袭击。我们等待了这么久才得到这样的画面，针对以色列军队。愿这成为更多行动的开端，以恢复黎巴嫩被占领的土地并解放黎巴嫩。这是一条漫长而痛苦的道路……但结果是肯定的。

text: "I also saw a lot of very strong, physically strong, really attractive law enforcement people come through those doors. And frankly, it made me feel very safe.” - Trump sounding kinda gay... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: “我还看到很多身体非常强壮、非常有吸引力的执法人员穿过那些门。坦率地说，这让我感到非常安全。” - 特朗普听起来有点同性恋倾向…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Ursula von der Leyen on Iran: It’s too early to lift sanctions. We need to see a fundamental change in Iran before any sanctions are dropped. This is about the suppression of human rights, particularly women’s rights.
text_zh: 乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩谈伊朗：现在解除制裁还为时过早。在取消任何制裁之前，我们需要看到伊朗发生根本性的变化。这关乎对人权的压制，特别是妇女权利。

text: The attack in Al-Sawana targeted a disabled Hezbullah fighter, from an old injury that predates this war. Even from the Syrian war. He was killed alongside his wife. Their 3 children and their grandpa were all seriously injured.
text_zh: Al-Sawana 的袭击目标是一名残疾的真主党战士，他因战争前的旧伤致残。甚至是在叙利亚战争期间受的伤。他和他的妻子一起被杀。他们的 3 个孩子和祖父都受了重伤。

text: 🇺🇦 The Director of the Institute of Demography and Social Research of the National Academy of Sciences of Ukraine Ella Libanova stated that no more than 30% of those who left will return to Ukraine after the war. In 2022, she predicted that number to be 50% but now, taking into account objective processes, she has lowered the forecast to 30%. According to her, people have settled abroad over the four years of war: they have found jobs, their children attend school and kindergarten, they have mastered the language and established connections. At the same time, in Ukraine something is being destroyed every day, people are losing their homes and jobs, even if they had them before. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰国家科学院人口与社会研究所所长 Ella Libanova 表示，战后离开的人中，返回乌克兰的比例不会超过 30%。2022 年，她预测这一数字为 50%，但现在考虑到客观进程，她将预测下调至 30%。据她称，四年的战争中，人们已经在国外定居：他们找到了工作，孩子上了学和幼儿园，掌握了语言并建立了联系。与此同时，在乌克兰，每天都有东西被摧毁，人们失去了家园和工作，即使他们以前拥有这些。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Afghan Taliban: 4 killed, 70 injured in mortar and rocket attacks by Pakistan. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 阿富汗塔利班：巴基斯坦的迫击炮和火箭弹袭击造成4人死亡，70人受伤。推文

text: ELINT News RT @manniefabian : IDF troops captured a cache of Hezbollah weapons in southern Lebanon, including first-person view (FPV) drones. The military says the weapons included anti-tank explosive devices and remote detonation systems, explosive-laden drones, RPGs, firearms, and other weapons. Hezbollah has made frequent use of small FPV drones in its attacks on Israeli troops in recent weeks. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @manniefabian：以色列国防军部队在黎巴嫩南部缴获了一批真主党武器，其中包括第一人称视角（FPV）无人机。军方称，这些武器包括反坦克爆炸装置、远程引爆系统、载有爆炸物的无人机、火箭筒、枪支及其他武器。近几周，真主党在针对以色列军队的袭击中频繁使用小型FPV无人机。推文

text: WarMonitor The Middle East conflict is disrupting supplies of key raw materials and driving up prices for printed circuit boards, a core component in everything from phones and computers to AI servers. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048771649533571447/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 中东冲突正在扰乱关键原材料的供应，并推高了印刷电路板的价格，这是从手机、电脑到人工智能服务器等所有设备的核心组件。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048771649533571447/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel First Lady Melania Trump on Jimmy Kimmel: "Time for ABC to take a stand." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普在吉米·坎摩尔秀上表示：“是时候让美国广播公司（ABC）表明立场了。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Anwar Gargash, diplomatic adviser to the UAE's President: There has always been a debate in the Gulf between the hawks and the doves. The hawks see Iran as a source of danger, and the doves believe that containing Iran is necessary because it is a neighbor. I think this debate has improved today in favor of the hawks; let's be clear about that. In 2000, we signed the Joint Defense Agreement, and we ultimately found that the GCC countries' position was correct logistically, the GCC countries supported each other, but politically and militarily, I think it was the weakest position in history. I expected such a weak stance from the Arab League, and I'm not surprised by it, but I don't expect it from the GCC, and I am surprised by it. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 阿联酋总统外交顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什：海湾地区在鹰派和鸽派之间一直存在争论。鹰派将伊朗视为危险源，而鸽派则认为遏制伊朗是必要的，因为它是邻国。我认为今天的辩论已经向有利于鹰派的方向发展；这一点必须明确。2000年，我们签署了《共同防御协议》，最终我们发现海湾合作委员会（GCC）国家的立场在后勤上是正确的，GCC国家相互支持，但在政治和军事上，我认为这是历史上最软弱的立场。我预料到阿拉伯国家联盟会采取这种软弱的立场，对此我并不感到惊讶，但我没想到GCC会这样，我对此感到惊讶。推文
